GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [o_orderpriority@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[o_orderpriority], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderpriority@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[o_orderpriority], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                GpuHashJoinExec
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                        GpuFilterExec
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=25565281
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=25565281
                        GpuFilterExec
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=25565281
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
  GpuSortExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
                GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=32, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
                    GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
                        GpuFilterExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=84
                          GpuScanExec: row_width=44, subtree_max_row_bytes=44
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                    GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                        GpuFilterExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=24
                          GpuScanExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16
